title: neoboutonia melleri
intro: Neoboutonia melleri, a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its extracts. The health benefits of Neoboutonia melleri include relief from pain, fever, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
